title: FULL SYLLABUS TEST-6 (ADVANCE LEVEL) (GATE - 2021)
extractionNotes: Q3 option D text was partially cut off across a page break in the source PDF screenshot; transcribed as '1/9' based on the visible fraction over 9, but this could not be fully confirmed.
Q7, Q11, Q31, Q41, and Q59 depend on a diagram/graphic in the question itself and are flagged with questionImage placeholders for separate cropping.
Q31's answer options are themselves small state-sequence diagrams (circles connected by arrows) rather than plain text; option text below is a best-effort textual description of each diagram.
Q48 option C text was partially obscured by a UI overlay in the screenshot; only options A, B, and D could be fully confirmed, matching the marked correct answers (a,b,d).
Q53's solution in the source PDF only states the final numeric answer with no worked derivation shown.

Q9 and Q10 solutions include a Venn-diagram / table image in the original PDF that is only used to illustrate the worked solution, not needed to answer the question, so questionImage is left null for both.
